name: Twinleaf Inn
description: A cozy lakeside retreat surrounded by nature and fresh air. Close to the water's edge and ideal for those seeking peace and quiet.

name: Sandgem Research Lodge
description: A quiet guesthouse steps from Professor Rowan's lab. Popular with researchers and academics visiting from across Sinnoh.

name: Jubilife Grand Hotel
description: A sophisticated city escape in the centre of Sinnoh's most prosperous metropolis. World-class dining, a rooftop terrace, and easy access to the city's finest shopping.

name: Oreburgh Mine Resort
description: A rugged boutique hotel carved into the mountainside. Features fossil exhibits and guided mine tours daily.

name: Eterna Forest Lodge
description: A secluded woodland retreat beside the ancient forest. Haunter sightings at dusk are a guest favourite.

name: Celestic Heritage Inn
description: A historic inn nestled in Sinnoh's oldest town. Rooms overlook ancient ruins with cave paintings of primal legends.

name: Hearthome Contest Hotel
description: Glamorous luxury hotel attached to the Contest Hall. A favourite among coordinators and celebrities visiting from across Sinnoh.

name: Solaceon Plains Hotel
description: A peaceful countryside stay near the Pokémon Day Care. Guests often wake to Unown sightings in the nearby ruins.

name: Pastoria Wetlands Resort
description: A waterfront resort beside the Great Marsh. Offers guided safari tours and Croagunk spotting at sunrise.

name: Veilstone Game Corner Suites
description: A sleek urban hotel above the famous Game Corner. Close to the department store and ideal for those who enjoy city life.

name: Snowpoint Arctic Lodge
description: A remote snowbound lodge near the legendary Snowpoint Temple. Heated rooms and hot springs make the arctic cold worthwhile.

name: Sunyshore Beachfront Hotel
description: A sun-drenched coastal luxury hotel powered by solar panels. Stunning views of the ocean and Volkner's iconic lighthouse.
